---
id: find-similar-artists
title: "Find similar artists"
description: "Triggers a search for artists similar to the specified artist and returns an HTML fragment with results."
sidebar_label: "Find similar artists"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Find similar artists"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/library/artist/{id}/find-similar"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers a search for artists similar to the specified artist and returns an HTML fragment with results.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
